suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the `[{ name: '' }]` empty company placeholder pattern as the canonical convention for unrestricted company scope in discovery runs. This pattern is used by both grounded_web and ATS lanes when `config.companies` is empty, and is critical for understanding how unrestricted scope works.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both features in this milestone (unrestricted-company-scope-preflight-and-grounded-foundation and unrestricted-company-scope-ats-and-mixed-routing) use this pattern in run-discovery.ts. The pattern evolved organically and is not currently documented.

rejectedObservations.observation: discovery-integration-worker SKILL.md was not found at the expected path
rejectedObservations.reason: The skill DOES exist at the project-level path: .factory/skills/discovery-integration-worker/SKILL.md. The reviewer looked in the wrong directory (~/.factory/skills/ instead of the project's .factory/skills/). No action needed.
